briefdescription.para: The orbital element theory used to compute the orbital elements from a Cartesian state.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Theory &aTheory, const RealCondition::Criterion &aCriterion, const Shared< const Frame > &aFrameSPtr, const EventCondition::Target &aTarget, const Derived &aGravitationalParameter)
memberdef.name: SemiMajorAxis

parameterdescription.para: The orbital element theory to use
The criterion used to resolve the Event Condition
A frame in which the element is to be computed
A Target
A gravitational parameter

memberdef.name: GenerateEvaluator

briefdescription.para: An orbital element based event condition. Supports evaluating the element using different orbital element theories (osculating or Brouwer-Lyddane mean).
